text: Please be advised that the price of fuel (petrol) is 12 rs costlier compared to other petrol pumps. It was 3 am, hence no option left other than to refuel it. The service is satisfactory and the staff are very courteous

text: I always love to fill my tank with Shell Fuels. Please increase your locations in Andheri East Mumbai. My car runs like sports car after using Shell Fuels. Simply superb quality of fuel worth filling tanks.

station_address: Tal - Kurla, Khairani Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072
text:
All staff present at place but still no one is ready to fill the fuel, saying it is company's rule we can not work for these 10 minutes. What is this rule for!!!
Neither anywhere it is mentioned that petrol pump will be closed for that time!!! People in queue waiting for fuel from 10 minutes now extra 10 minutes for their bullish rule. Very disappointed!

station_address: Tal - Kurla, Khairani Rd, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400072
text: Please make sure to gate the receipt of how much petrol your filling here because today (15 sept 2023) I am filling 750 rupees petrol after payment by card I was standing there for oil change the girl come to me and saying you are not paying the petrol money thank God the guy omkar who changing my oil saw the card in my hand he tell the girl please check your bag correctly after few minutes she get receipt in her bag only but it's very disappointment from shell petrol pump. I am living in Parel and  I come here only to fill out petrol but today's experience was not good.
